series_metadata.series_title: Community Services Block Grant (CSBG) Eligibility File
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents state, federal, and other sponsored grant projects participated in or administered by state agencies. It includes grant authorization records, which provide evidence of the award of grants to or by agencies; grant/project financial or performance reports, which are periodic reports of financial activity and/or program performance related to grants received or made by agencies. This series includes documentation related to the designation and termination of an eligible entity.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Retention requirements may
vary depending on the specific funding
agency. Records in this series may be
subject to Government Code 441.1855.
Agencies must ensure that records are
retained for the appropriate retention
period.

series_metadata.series_title: Agency Rules, Policies and Procedures- Working Files

related documentation used in creating
the final rules, policies, and procedures,
are not subject to archival requirement
and may be disposed of at the
expiration of the retention period.

series_metadata.series_description: Including any supporting documentation created and/or used to justify and support legislative appropriations requests by an agency.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final
version of Legislative
Appropriation Requests must
be submitted to the Texas
State Publications Depository
Program per 13 TAC
3.3(a)(3)(A). Working files and related
documentation used in creating the
final plan are not subject to archival
review and
may be disposed of at the
expiration of the retention
period.

series_metadata.series_title: Speeches, Papers and Presentations Talking Points

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only
speeches, papers, and
presentations given by or on
behalf of executive staff, board or
commission members, division
directors and program heads require
archival review.

series_metadata.series_description: Notes or text of speeches, papers, presentations, or reports delivered in conjunction with agency work.

ARCHIVES NOTE: Only speeches,

series_metadata.series_description: Articles, Brochures, Handouts, and Success Stories.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Many state publications
must be submitted to the Texas State
Publications Depository Program,
TSLAC, by law (Government Code,
441.103- 441.105). The Texas State
Library and Archives Commission will
retain a copy of all state publications
submitted to it on a continuing basis,
subject to periodic evaluation to
determine if the publication merits
further retention.
For additional information and
requirements concerning state
publications made available to the
public through the internet, consult the
administrative rules of the Texas State
Publications Depository Program of the
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission.

series_metadata.series_description: Staff-created summaries of proposed legislation and associated financial analyses of how proposed legislation would impact the department and the cost of implementing the legislation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Fiscal Year End

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: This series does not include
fiscal reports created to fulfill grant
requirements.

series_metadata.series_description: Operational strategic plans, which include descriptions of information resources programs, prepared in accordance with Government Code, 2054.095 and 2056.002. Includes working files and related documentation used in creating the final plan.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final version of
Strategic Plans must be submitted to
the Texas State Publications Depository
Program per 13 TAC 3.3(a)(2)(C).
Working files and related
documentation used in creating the
final plan are not subject to archival
review and may be disposed of at the
expiration of the retention period.

tracking_data.comments:
The State Auditor's Office (SAO) retains
any copies of its audits performed on
Texas state agencies.

series_metadata.series_description: Includes all correspondence and documentation relating to requests for records that are furnished to the public under the Public Information Act (Chapter 552, Government Code). Also includes withdrawn requests.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_metadata.series_description: Manuals, guidelines, administrative rules, or similar records distributed internally for the use of employees, externally to the public, or to those individuals or entities regulated by the TRR Program that sets out the rules, policies, and procedures that govern TRR's programs, services, or projects. Includes working files and related documentation used in creating rules, policies, and procedures.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Working files and
related documentation used in creating
the final rules, policies, and procedures,
are not subject to archival requirement
and may be disposed of at the
expiration of the retention period.

series_metadata.series_description: Operational strategic plans, which include descriptions of information resources programs, prepared in accordance with Government Code, 2054.095 and 2056.002. Includes working files and related documentation used in creating the final plan.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final
version of Strategic Plans must be
submitted to the Texas State
Publications Depository Program per 13
TAC 3.3(a)(2)(C). Working files and
related documentation used in creating
the final plan are not subject to archival

series_metadata.series_description: Charts or diagrams that show the structure of an agency and the relationships and relative ranks of its departments and job positions, in addition to the hire dates for each TRR staff member.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Superseded

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only charts showing
the overall arrangement and
administrative structure of the state
agency need to be transferred to the
Archives and Information Services
Division, Texas State Library and
Archives Commission. Organizational
charts showing division/department
level detail are not considered archival.

series_metadata.series_description: TRRP allocation, budget and reallocation files.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Fiscal Year End

series_metadata.series_description: Federal & Treasury Guidance, including incoming/outgoing and internal leadership, supervisory, managerial, executive, administrative, substantive, and other high- level correspondence in any media, including electronic communication, pertaining to the formulation, planning, implementation, interpretation, modification, or redefinition of the programs, services, or projects of an agency and the administrative regulations, policies, and procedures that govern them.

retention_rules.trigger_event: 5 years

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only the
administrative correspondence of
executive staff, board or commission
members, division directors and
program heads require archival review.
Contact the State Archives when these
records have met their retention
periods.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

series_metadata.series_description: Contracts, leases, and agreements include general obligation, land lease, utilities, and construction except for buildings. Documents include specifications, affidavits of publication of calls for bids, performance bonds, contracts, purchase orders, inspection reports, and correspondence. May also include other applicable documentation in the master contract file per Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts Contract Management Guide. Executed, renewed, or amended on or after September 1, 2015.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled)
